videos.title: Greer Says He Doesn't Expect Taiwan Issue to Affect Trade With China | The Asia Trade 5/15/2026
videos.description:
"Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Beijing and Tokyo with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Shery Ahn, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets.

Chapters:
00:00:00 - Bloomberg: The Asia Trade begins
00:01:00 - Xi’s threat to Trump cements Taiwan as the top US-China risk
00:06:31 - Xi tells US CEOs during Trump visit that China will open up more
00:15:40 - Natixis’s Alicia Garcia Herrero on the global economic outlook
00:24:41 - Renmin University’s Wang Yiwei on geopolitical risks
00:31:32 - How the US can break China’s rare earths grip
00:35:32 - Chinese chipmakers’ lofty valuations prompt investor caution
00:39:13 - BREAKING: Gautam and Sagar Adani agree to pay $18 total over SEC case
00:40:27 - Franklin CEO Johnson warns of risks of data center obsolescence
00:43:58 - BREAKING: Japan April export prices rise 18.9% y/y; import prices +17.5%
00:47:12 - Markets open in Japan, South Korea, and Australia
00:48:25 - EXCLUSIVE: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer on Trump-Xi meeting outcomes
01:04:12 - US expects dramatic agricultural purchases by China
01:13:52 - Ascalon Capital’s Isaac Poole on investment strategy
01:21:20 - OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar on Altman-Musk tensions, growth plans and funding outlook
--------

videos.title: China Calls for Hormuz Reopening | The China Show 5/15/2026
videos.description:
“Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, David Ingles and Yvonne Man give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.

videos.title: Comparing China and US Statements on Trump-Xi Summit
videos.description:
President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing has dominated Chinese state media, with news stories and commentary mostly striking a positive tone. Despite the grand ceremonies and glowing coverage, however, a comparison of summit readouts from the US and China suggests differences remain on key issues.
--------

videos.title: Trump-Xi Talk Taiwan, Trade & Iran During Summit | Balance of Power 05/14/2026
videos.description:
"Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Melanie Hart, Atlantic Council Global China Hub Senior Director, discusses whether or not the meeting between President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping was successful. Representative Marlin Stutzman (R-IN), says China reopening to US beef is a "big deal" for farmers and calls President Trump's Beijing trip "one of the most consequential" of his presidency. Representative Jake Auchincloss (D-MA) says Xi Jinping is projecting confidence at the US-China summit and urges the US to “watch what he does” after President Trump said Xi would not send weapons to Iran.

Chapters:
00:00:00 - Balance of Power: Late Edition Begins
00:01:38 - Tyler Kendall on What’s Yet to Come & What’s Already Been Accomplished During Trump-Xi Summit
00:05:49 - Michael Shepard on Nvidia Gains 20% in Seven Days, Nears $6T Market Value, Cerebras Climbs 68% After Year’s Biggest IPO
00:11:43 - Siddharth Phillip on Boeing Falls After Trump Unveils Smaller China Order
00:17:17 - Melanie Hart, Atlantic Council Global China Hub Senior Dir., on Whether Or Not First Day Talks Between Trump & Xi Were Successful
00:24:05 - Breaking News: SCOTUS Preserves Abortion Pill Access By Mail For Now
00:25:13 - Power Brief: Top Stories Watching Tonight
00:27:55 - Rep. Marlin Stutzman (R-IN) on Significance of US China Beef Deal, Federal Gas Tax Holiday, CLARITY Act
00:38:01 - The Debrief With Mario Parker: Trump Floats Temporary US Gas Tax Halt
00:40:01 - Rep. Jake Auchincloss (D-MA) Shares His Thoughts on Trump-Xi Summit, Gas Tax Holiday, War Powers Act Vote, Trump Xi & Taiwan
--------

videos.title: Tech Stocks Power Wall Street Gains | The Close 5/14/2026
videos.description:
Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are SoFI Investment strategy head Liz Thomas, Dow Chair & CEO Jim Fitterling, Meredith Whitney Advisory Group CEO Meredith Whitney, VF Corporation CEO Bracken Darrell, Morgan Stanley’s Michelle Weaver, UC San Diego’s Caroline Freund, Bain Capital Partner Angelo Rufino, Invesco President & CEO Andrew Schlossberg, Once Upon A Farm Co-Founder & CEO John Foraker

videos.title: Xi, Trump Meet in China | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/14/2026
videos.description:
On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Donald Trump's trip to China. On today's show, Republican Senator Ted Budd, Democratic Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Bully Pulpit International Managing Director Adam Hodge and Republican Senator Steve Daines.

videos.title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Systems Surges 81% in Trading Debut
videos.description:
Cerebras Systems Inc. shares jumped 81% in its trading debut on the Nasdaq, after the artificial intelligence chipmaker and data center firm raised $5.55 billion in the year’s largest initial public offering. Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda is tracking the action for us.
--------
